# Source: https://support.google.com/mail/answer/56256?hl=en
# Query: 进口食品 中文标签 检验检疫

To sign up for Gmail, create a Google Account. You can use the username and password to sign in to Gmail and other Google products like YouTube, Google Play, and Google Drive.
Sign up for a Gmail account
Important: Before you set up a new Gmail account, make sure to sign out of your current Gmail account. [Learn how to sign out of Gmail](https://support.google.com/mail/answer/8154?hl=en&co=GENIE.Platform%3DAndroid).
- From your device, go to the
[Google Account sign in page](https://accounts.google.com/signin). - Click Create account.
- In the drop down, select if the account is for your:
- Personal use
- Child
- Work or business
- To set up your account, follow the steps on the screen.
Tip: To use Gmail for your business, a Google Workspace account might be better for you than a personal Google Account. With Google Workspace, you get increased storage, professional email addresses, and additional features. [Learn about Google Workspace pricing and plans](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html).
The username I want is taken
You can’t create a Gmail address if the username you requested is:
- Already being used.
- Very similar to an existing username.
- For example, if example@gmail.com already exists, you can't use examp1e@gmail.com.
- The same as a username that someone used in the past and then deleted.
- Reserved by Google to prevent spam or abuse.
Someone is impersonating me
If you believe someone has created a Gmail address to try to impersonate your identity, you can:
- File a report with the
[Internet Crime Complaint Center](https://www.ic3.gov). - Contact your state's Office of Consumer Protection.
Unfortunately, Gmail is unable to participate in mediations involving third parties regarding impersonation. [Learn more about Gmail Terms of Use](https://www.google.com/mail/help/terms_of_use.html).
